Update._comment: Velopack SimpleWebSource feed. The 'releases/latest/download' alias resolves to whatever the most recent published GitHub Release is, so installed users auto-detect each new tag. Override with an empty string to disable update checks (e.g. for internal forks).

Plugins._comment: AllowUnsigned (default): prompt the user once at install time whenever a plugin isn't Authenticode-signed; load-time gate is open. RequireTrustedPublisher: org-managed mode — only load plugins signed by a thumbprint in TrustedPublisherThumbprints, no interactive override.

NuGet._comment: Plugins are discovered by querying nuget.org for packages tagged with DiscoveryTag. Authors publish their plugin to NuGet with that tag in <PackageTags>; the in-app browser surfaces every match. Override SearchUrl to point at a corporate NuGet mirror.
